nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: Located behind the corpus callosum, the Pineal Gland regulates the sleep and wake cycles.

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: Kael opens his eyes and finds himself in an unfamiliar world. You arrive at the Pineal Gland, the realm hidden behind the corpus callosum that governs the cycle of sleep and wakefulness.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: Where am I...? What is this place?

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: Kael? How did you get here?

nodes.speaker: SFX
nodes.text: Slight tremor.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: Who are you?! How do you know my name?

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: You see a vibrant pink creature standing in a surreal world unlike anything you have ever seen.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: This has to be a dream...

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: I guess, technically, it is...? I'm Rona, an Energeon.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: Energeon...? What's that?

nodes.speaker: SFX
nodes.text: The ground shakes violently.

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: Pieces of the environment begin to crumble. At this rate, the world may not last much longer. Rona seems to have an idea.

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: Ah! You being here must mean something! Stop asking questions and come with me!

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: A pathway ahead is blocked by tangled veins.

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: Dang it! The tremors must've caused these veins to collapse.

nodes.speaker: SFX
nodes.text: The bushes rustle violently. Rona flinches in fear, only to find Murial emerging from them.

nodes.speaker: Murial
nodes.text: Argh... This place is really falling apart.

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: You scared me!

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: Who is that?

nodes.speaker: Murial
nodes.text: Kael?

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: That's Murial!

nodes.speaker: Murial
nodes.text: How did he get here?

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: Stop with the questions! Can't you see this world is falling apart? Murial, clear those veins, will you?

nodes.speaker: Objective
nodes.text: Use Murial's power to lift and clear the fallen veins.
